8.text: Good works are only such as God hath commanded in his holy Word, and not such as, without the warrant thereof, are devised by men, out of blind zeal, or upon any pretence of good intention.
The Scriptures principally teach what man is to believe concerning God, and what duty God requires of man.
The duty which God requireth of man is obedience to his revealed will.

The scriptures principally teach, what man is to believe concerning God, and what duty God requires of man.
            ( 2 Tim. 1:13 ; Mic. 6:8 )

The duty which God requireth of man, is obedience to his revealed will.
            ( Rom. 12:1–2 ; Mic. 6:8 )
